purpose: Close two rejected BX22 proposals as duplicate canonical identities after records validation.

entries.notes: BX22 records validation confirmed that the Buda.com name and buda.com domain are already canonical entity hei_ex_000054. The proposed duplicate record was removed and the candidate is terminally closed as duplicate.

BX22 records validation confirmed that the BMX names and bmx.trade domain are already consolidated under BMX Trade entity hei_ex_000610. The proposed duplicate record was removed and the candidate is terminally closed as duplicate.
